name: Corn Fritters with Orange Dippin Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 cups corn kernels, fresh or frozen and thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, beat the eggs and milk.
2. In another bowl, stir the cumin over the flour. Season well with salt and pepper.
3. Beat the egg mixture into the flour using a whisk.
4. Stir in the corn and parsley.
5. Heat oil to 375° F (190°C).
6. Drop the corn mixture into the hot fat without crowding the pan. Fry, turning once, until golden brown.
7. Remove and drain on paper towels.
8. Serve hot with Sauce.
Directions for Sauce:
1. Combine the marmalade, orange juice, lemon juice, ginger, ground cumin, and mustard in a blender.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Pour into a serving bowl and stir in the hot pepper sauce.
